name: Synup vs Yext: Which Local Marketing Platform Gives You More Control?
hero_main_title: Why burn your pockets for an old-school solution that offers little control over your listings?
hero_summary: Looking for a Yext alternative that doesn’t lock your listings or your budget? Synup gives businesses and agencies full ownership of their listings, better support, and more powerful local SEO tools without the complexity or high cost of Yext.

new_heading: Synup Is the Best Yext Alternative for SMBs, Agencies, and Growing Brands
new_summary: Choose Synup if you want: 1. Full ownership of your business listings, 2. Built-in review and reputation tools, 3. Better support and pricing flexibility, 4. Local SEO tools without additional software. Yext is still a strong choice for large enterprises, but if you're looking for a platform that gives you control, visibility, and scalability — Synup is the better alternative.
section_2_heading: How Synup Outperforms Yext for Local SEO, Listings, and Reputation
section_2_summary: While Yext is a well-known solution with an extensive directory network, Synup is built for marketing agencies that value transparency, performance, and flexibility. Here’s a detailed breakdown of how the two platforms compare:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup OS is purpose-built for agencies and resellers, not just enterprise brands. While Yext offers a rigid, top-down platform, Synup OS gives you the tools to run and grow a scalable local marketing business.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Synup gives you permanent control of your listings, even if you cancel. Yext removes or disables your listings when you stop paying, creating unnecessary platform lock-in. While both platforms connect to major publishers via API, Synup stands out by offering a simpler, more intuitive interface. It ensures that listings remain active even after a subscription ends and eliminates the burden of long-term contracts and hidden fees.
section_2_step_3_summary: In comparison to Yext's review management, Synup provides a more efficient and integrated approach, offering AI-powered responses in multiple languages and CRM/POS integrations to run automated review generation campaigns for clients. Synup also features sentiment analysis and provides alerts and filters that can be customized by location or rating, offering a more granular and insightful approach to managing client reputation.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Synup includes a built-in, AI-assisted social media platform for multi-location scheduling, branded content templates, and performance insights. Yext’s social tools are limited and often require third-party add-ons.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
why_choose_tab_desc_1: With Synup, you maintain full control and ownership of your business listings. Unlike Yext, your listings remain yours, even if you decide to discontinue our services. We believe in empowering you with complete autonomy over your online presence.
why_choose_tab_title_2: Indexed Listings for Better Share of Voice
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We don’t just publish listings, we make sure they’re indexed by search engines so they show up where it matters: on Google Maps, local packs, and organic search. It improves your clients’ Share of Voice in local searches.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Gain valuable insights into your local ranking performance with Synup's robust tracking capabilities. Unlike Yext's limited offerings, our platform provides detailed analytics, empowering you to optimize your online presence and stay ahead of the competition.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: Setting New Standards in Digital Interaction
why_choose_content_summary: Embrace the Future with Synup – Where Innovation Drives Engagement.

Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
